name: react-router-7/data
notes: React Router 7 data-mode (SPA) Ring 1 scenario. Distinct from /framework: data mode keeps the router as a config object passed to RouterProvider, so init lands at the SPA entry (src/main.tsx) before the router is mounted, not in entry.client.tsx. SDK family defaults from FRAMEWORK_TO_SDK (browser frameworks → @amplitude/unified).
